name: Chocolate Chip Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, granulated sugar, packed light brown sugar, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Add flour and blend until smooth.
5. Stir in the small chocolate chips.
6. Mold a scant tablespoon of dough around each chocolate piece, covering it completely.
7. Shape into balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set.
9. Allow cookies to cool slightly, then remove from the cookie sheet to a wire rack.
10. Cool completely.
11. Drizzle topping over each cookie (optional). About 4 dozen cookies.
